title: Build Bunsik Korean Restaurant Website

requirements.text: Rebuild the entire frontend as the Bunsik Korean Restaurant website. Replace all existing Luna's Kitchen branding, content, colors, fonts, and components. Apply a Korean street food inspired theme with a warm red (#C0392B tones), black, and cream color palette, modern clean layout, and mobile-first responsive design. Use legible sans-serif fonts suitable for a casual-premium restaurant. Update index.html meta title, description, and keywords for Bunsik Korean Restaurant in Griffith NSW.

quotes: Warm red, black, and cream color palette
Clean modern layout with high-quality food images

acceptanceCriteria: No Luna's Kitchen branding, text, or color variables remain anywhere in the frontend
Tailwind config reflects Bunsik's red/black/cream brand palette
Google Fonts import uses fonts appropriate for the Korean street food premium casual style
index.html title and meta tags reference Bunsik Korean Restaurant and Griffith NSW
All pages and components are fully responsive and look great on mobile screens

requirements.text: Create a full-screen Hero section with: headline 'Authentic Korean Street Food in Griffith', subheadline 'Fresh • Flavorful • Made with Love', and three CTA buttons: 'View Menu' (smooth scrolls to menu section), 'Order Online' (scrolls to ordering section), and 'Book a Table' (scrolls to reservation section). The background must show generated images of Korean fried chicken and tteokbokki with a dark overlay for text legibility.

quotes: Big headline: 'Authentic Korean Street Food in Griffith'
Subheadline: Fresh • Flavorful • Made with Love
Buttons: View Menu, Order Online, Book a Table
Show fried chicken and tteokbokki images in background.

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section is full viewport height
Headline, subheadline, and three buttons are visible on both mobile and desktop
All three buttons trigger smooth scroll to their respective sections
Background displays the fried chicken and tteokbokki hero image with a semi-transparent dark overlay

requirements.text: Create an About Us section with: the restaurant story text ('Bunsik Korean Restaurant brings the taste of authentic Korean street food and traditional meals to Griffith. From crispy Korean fried chicken to sizzling bulgogi and comforting stews, we serve bold flavors in a casual, family-friendly atmosphere.'), location address ('Shop 1/2 Yambil St, Griffith NSW 2680 – Located in Griffin Plaza'), and phone number (+61 2 6964 7310).

quotes: Bunsik Korean Restaurant brings the taste of authentic Korean street food

acceptanceCriteria: About Us section displays the full story paragraph
Address and Griffin Plaza reference are shown
Phone number is displayed and tappable as a tel: link on mobile

requirements.text: Create an Opening Hours section displaying the full weekly schedule: Sunday 11am–8pm; Monday–Thursday 11am–3pm, 5pm–9pm; Friday 11am–3pm, 5pm–9pm; Saturday 11am–9pm. Highlight the current day visually.
acceptanceCriteria: All seven days and their hours are shown
The current day of the week is highlighted
Section is clearly readable on mobile

requirements.text: Create a Menu section with four tabbed or visually separated categories. Each category lists all items with name and price exactly as specified: Korean Street Food (Rose Tteokbokki $12.50, Tteokbokki $11.00, Kimchi Pancake $28.60, Seafood Pancake $31.20, Gimbap $12.35, Fried Dumplings (5pcs) $16.50); Korean Fried Chicken (Original $18.50, Sweet Soy $19.50, Hot & Spicy $19.50, Snow Cheese $19.50, Sweet & Spicy $19.50); Signature Meals (Bibimbap $27.30, Sizzling Beef Bulgogi $29.90, Kimchi Stew $29.90, Galbi-Tang $33.90, Cheese Spicy Chicken $33.90, Chicken Katsu $29.90); CUPBAP Bowls (Hot & Spicy Chicken CUPBAP $17.55, Sweet Soy Chicken CUPBAP $17.55, Beef Bulgogi CUPBAP $18.20, Spicy Pork CUPBAP $18.20).
acceptanceCriteria: All four categories are clearly labeled
Every item and its price is shown exactly as specified
Categories can be navigated via tabs or scroll sections
Menu section is easily readable on mobile

requirements.text: Create an Online Ordering section with two prominent buttons: 'Order Pickup' and 'Order Delivery'. Include descriptive text inviting customers to order online. The buttons should be styled prominently and link to placeholder order URLs (e.g., '#order-pickup' and '#order-delivery') that can be updated later.
acceptanceCriteria: Two distinct buttons for pickup and delivery are visible in their own section
Buttons are large and tappable on mobile
Section has a clear heading and supporting copy

requirements.text: Create a Table Reservation section with an online booking form collecting: Name (text input), Phone (tel input), Date (date picker), Time (time picker), and Number of Guests (number input). On form submission, store the reservation in the backend and show a success confirmation message to the user.
acceptanceCriteria: Form includes all five fields with appropriate input types
All fields are required and validated before submission
Reservation data is persisted in the Motoko backend
A success message is displayed after successful submission
Form is fully usable on mobile

requirements.text: Create a Reviews section displaying a 4.7-star rating prominently (e.g., '4.7 ★ out of 5'), and a carousel or scrollable list of at least three customer testimonials. Testimonials should reflect authentic Korean restaurant dining experiences.
acceptanceCriteria: 4.7 star rating is displayed prominently with star icons
At least three testimonial cards are shown
Carousel or horizontal scroll works on mobile
Testimonials include reviewer name and review text

requirements.text: Create a Location & Contact section displaying: address (Shop 1/2 Yambil St, Griffith NSW 2680), phone (+61 2 6964 7310), an embedded Google Map iframe for the Griffin Plaza location, and info badges for: Free Parking Lot, Wheelchair Accessible, and Accepts Credit/Debit/NFC Payments.
acceptanceCriteria: Google Map iframe is embedded and shows the correct address
Address and phone number are displayed and phone is a tappable tel: link
Three amenity badges (parking, accessibility, payments) are visible
Section is responsive on mobile

requirements.text: Create a site-wide Header/Navigation with the Bunsik logo/name, smooth-scroll links to all main sections (Menu, Order, Reservations, About, Contact), and a mobile hamburger menu. Create a Footer with business name, address, phone, opening hours summary, and copyright.

quotes: Create a modern, premium, mobile-friendly website for Bunsik Korean Restaurant

acceptanceCriteria: Header is fixed at the top and includes nav links to all sections
Mobile hamburger menu opens and closes correctly
Footer includes address, phone, and abbreviated hours
Both header and footer use the Bunsik brand color palette

requirements.text: Implement the Motoko backend actor with a storeReservation function that accepts name, phone, date, time, and guestCount fields and persists them in stable storage. Expose a getReservations query function for admin review.
acceptanceCriteria: storeReservation update method accepts all five fields and appends to stable array
getReservations query returns all stored reservations
Motoko compiles without errors

constraints: All user-facing text must be in English
Do not use blue or purple as primary brand colors; use the specified warm red, black, and cream palette
Phone number +61 2 6964 7310 must appear exactly as provided and be a tappable tel: link on mobile
All menu items and prices must match the specification exactly
Do not edit files in frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Third-party delivery platform API integration (e.g., UberEats, DoorDash)
Admin dashboard for managing reservations beyond basic backend storage

required: Wide hero background showing Korean fried chicken and tteokbokki dishes on a dark moody table setting with warm red accent lighting (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
Appetizing close-up of Rose Tteokbokki in a bowl with gochujang sauce and melted cheese (tteokbokki.dim_600x400.png)
Crispy golden Korean fried chicken pieces with dipping sauce on a dark plate (fried-chicken.dim_600x400.png)
Colorful Bibimbap bowl with assorted vegetables, egg, and sesame oil drizzle (bibimbap.dim_600x400.png)
Bunsik restaurant logo — bold Korean-style text 'Bunsik' in red and cream on black background (logo.dim_400x200.png)
